summary: Task 7 implementation correctly wires RestartCrashBanner + SAF export into ModelManagerScreen following the documented Flow B contract. All 10 acceptance criteria are satisfied; patterns (SnackbarHost, Result<Unit> wrapper, in-flight guard reset in finally, PaddingValues(0.dp) on inner ModelList, Locale.ROOT timestamp) mirror AboutScreen/AboutViewModel exactly. One minor KDoc drift (dangling [clearCrashState] reference) is the only finding.

findings.issue: KDoc on `hasUnresolvedCrash` references `[clearCrashState]` but no such method exists on this ViewModel. The actual public proxies are `refreshCrashState`, `dismissCrashBanner`, and `saveLogAndClearCrash`. `CrashState.clear()` is only reached indirectly from inside `saveLogAndClearCrash`, not via a standalone proxy.
findings.fix: Replace `[clearCrashState]` with `[saveLogAndClearCrash]` (or drop the third item and say `..., and [saveLogAndClearCrash], which ...calls CrashState.refresh() after the mutation`). No behavioural change — doc correction only.
